query: Longlegs universe new movie Paramount Pictures distribution budget exceeded Neon

{"query":"Longlegs universe new movie Paramount Pictures distribution budget exceeded Neon","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1090,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/new-longlegs-movie-nicolas-cage-1236564219/","title":"New Longlegs Movie in the Works from Nicolas Cage, Osgood Perkins","content":"Osgood Perkins is working on a new Longlegs feature, a follow-up to the filmmaker’s mystery horror thriller that became highest-grossing independent film of the past decade.
Paramount has picked up the rights to the new mystery Longlegs project, which Perkins has written and will direct as well as produce.
Nicolas Cage is returning as star and producer.
Longlegs was an out-of-nowhere hit when released by Neon in 2024, launching Perkins as a name horror filmmaker and establishing the star bona fides of Maika Monroe.
Longlegs earned $128 million worldwide on a budget of less than $10 million, becoming Neon’s highest-grossing domestic outing.
Sources say that Neon stepped aside when the new project’s scope and budget exceeded that of the company’s normal parameters."},{"url":"https://www.resetera.com/threads/new-longlegs-based-movie-in-the-works-at-paramount-with-osgood-perkins-and-nicolas-cage-returning.1491259/","title":"New 'Longlegs' based movie in the works at Paramount with Osgood Perkins and Nicolas Cage returning News - Entertainment | ResetEra","content":"And in a twist out of the Longlegs playbook, rather than original distributor Neon being involved, this one has Skydance-owned Paramount Pictures as the project's new home.
### Osgood Perkins, Nicolas Cage Team with Paramount for New ‘Longlegs’ Movie (Exclusive)
Get ready for the 'Longlegs' horror universe.
Longlegs did not need a bigger budget and scope."},{"url":"https://dailydead.com/paramount-pictures-acquires-rights-to-new-movie-set-in-the-longlegs-universe-osgood-perkins-to-write-direct-produce/","title":"Paramount Pictures Acquires Rights to New Movie "Set in the Longlegs Universe," Osgood Perkins to Write, Direct, Produce - Daily Dead","content":"Additional producers include: "Brian Kavanaugh Jones (Range Media Partners); Perkins and Chris Ferguson, through their company Phobos; and Dave Caplan under his C2 banner, which originated the rights to the property."
Ahead of the new Longlegs film, we'll see Perkins' The Young People, which recently wrapped production and stars Nicole Kidman, Lola Tung, and Nico Parker.
After more than a decade as a consultant in the entertainment industry, Jonathan James launched Daily Dead in 2010 to share his passion for horror.
Over the course of his career, Jonathan has written more than 10,000 articles and hosted panels at major conventions, including New York Comic Con and San Diego Comic-Con.
Independently owned and operated since 2010, millions of people from around the world have made Daily Dead their destination for coverage of the horror entertainment industry."},{"url":"https://www.flickeringmyth.com/osgood-perkins-and-nicolas-cage-to-return-for-new-longlegs-movie/","title":"Osgood Perkins and Nicolas Cage to return for new Longlegs movie","content":"There’s also a change on the distribution front, with Paramount Pictures picking up the rights to Longlegs from Neon, who oversaw the release of the 2024 original to the tune of $127 million at the worldwide box-office.
That’s even more impressive when you consider it cost under $10 million to produce.
Nicolas Cage has just finished shooting another sequel you didn’t expect to happen with Lords of War, writer-director Andrew Niccol’s follow-up to his 2005 arms dealer drama Lord of War, while Perkins has wrapped production on his Nicole Kidman headlined horror, The Young People."},{"url":"https://www.upcominghorrormovies.com/movie/longlegs-spinoff","title":"Longlegs Spinoff | UHM - UpcomingHorrorMovies","content":"Anyone who donates will also be listed in our thanks page."}]}

The film stars Maika Monroe, Blair Underwood, Alicia Witt, and Nicolas Cage. *Longlegs* premiered in Los Angeles at the Grauman's Egyptian Theatre on July 8, 2024, and was released theatrically in the United States by Neon \"Neon (company)\") on July 12, 2024. It received positive reviews and grossed $128 million worldwide on a budget of less than $10 million, becoming Neon's highest-grossing film domestically, the highest-grossing independent film of the year, and Perkins's highest-grossing film.
